pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.7 to 2.7.3 to align with Java 11 support and newer dependencies.
Rename the project artifact ID to reflect a shift towards a low-code UI solution.
Add Spring Boot WebSocket starter to support real-time communication features.
Add Spring Boot Data JPA starter to enable database persistence capabilities.
Update springdoc-openapi-ui to version 1.6.11 for API documentation improvements.
Add Camunda Tasklist Java client to interact with the Tasklist component.
Add OkHttp client library for HTTP communication needs.
Add Camunda Operate Java client to interact with the Operate component.
Add Camunda Google Web Services Java client for integration with Google services.
Add Jakarta Mail dependency to support email functionality.
Add H2 database as a runtime dependency for in-memory database support.
Add Spring Boot Test starter for unit and integration testing.
Add Spring Zeebe Test Testcontainer for container-based testing of Zeebe processes.
Add Spotify FMT Maven plugin to enforce Google Java code formatting standards.
Explicitly set the Spring Boot Maven plugin version to ensure build consistency.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add H2 database files to .gitignore to prevent committing local database state.
Add React build artifacts and dependencies to .gitignore to keep the repository clean.

docker-compose-core.yaml.general_idea: Update the default Zeebe image version to 8.0.5 to align with the newer platform release.
Update the default Operate image version to 8.0.5 to align with the newer platform release.
Update the default Tasklist image version to 8.0.5 to align with the newer platform release.
Disable X-Pack security in Elasticsearch to allow insecure connections, likely for local development simplicity.

docker-compose.yaml.general_idea: Update Zeebe image version to 8.0.5 to align with the new platform release.
Update Operate image version to 8.0.5 to align with the new platform release.
Update Tasklist image version to 8.0.5 to align with the new platform release.
Update Optimize image version to 3.8.5 to align with the new platform release.
Mount a custom environment configuration file for Optimize to handle specific deployment settings.
Update Identity image version to 8.0.5 to align with the new platform release.
Add a retry delay configuration for Identity to improve startup stability.
Add a health check for the Keycloak service to ensure it is ready before dependent services start.
Define a dependency on the PostgreSQL service for Keycloak to ensure correct startup order.
Disable Elasticsearch security features to allow insecure connections, likely for local development simplicity.
Define a named volume for PostgreSQL data persistence.
